title: Implement did.rs module
description: Core DID functions matching gaja/smallhold API: generate_recovery_keypair() -> (SigningKey, VerifyingKey), ed25519_to_did_key(pub) -> String (multicodec 0xed01 + base58btc z6Mk prefix), did_web(domain, username) -> String (did:web:{domain}:users:{username} with dots->colons), did_web_document(domain, username, rsa_pub_pem, also_known_as) -> JSON (W3C DID v1 with RsaVerificationKey2018 + Ed25519VerificationKey2020), private_key_to_mnemonic/mnemonic_to_private_key (BIP-39 24-word). Include tests with known vectors, not self-referential.
